summary: Successfully curated and packaged all N5OS philosophy and infrastructure content into the payload directory structure. Created 39 markdown files across 7 categories: principles (14), safety (4), operations (6), personas (8), workflows (5), voice (1), and state (1). All content has been sanitized to remove hardcoded paths (replaced with {{WORKSPACE}} placeholders) and va-specific UUIDs (replaced with placeholder tokens). The payload is ready for installation on target instances.
learnings: P24-P39 principle files also included wisdom_roots_operational_view.md which is valuable content
Voice anti-patterns were successfully extracted from SQLite database and structured as documentation
Sanitization required removing both /home/workspace paths and persona UUIDs from multiple files
INDEX.md in personas needed special handling to replace the canonical UUID list with placeholders
